programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Akshay Kumar, Vidya Balan, Fardeen Khan, Ritesh Deshmukh, Anupam Kher, Boman Irani

programme.title: Bollywood Diaries
programme.desc: Rohit, Vishnu, and Imli are aspiring actors who come from different backgrounds and dream to make it big in Bollywood. However, each of them must diligently brave both internal and professional struggles to even survive in the coveted industry.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Akshay Kumar, Vidya Balan, Fardeen Khan, Ritesh Deshmukh, Anupam Kher, Boman Irani

programme.title: Awara Paagal Deewana
programme.desc: A henpecked husband and his father-in-law are intrigued by their new neighbour Gulab Khatri, a recluse and mysterious man. They unwittingly get embroiled in a mafia rivalry when they find out that he's a wanted criminal.

programme.title: Taxi No 9211
programme.desc: A taxi driver and a spoiled rich man's lives collide, changing both forever in one day.

programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
